# Pixza Studio — AI Creative Platform
# llms.txt — AI/LLM Discovery File
# https://llmstxt.org

> Pixza Studio is an AI-powered creative platform for image, video, audio, and 3D generation. Built for creators, designers, and businesses in India and globally. Subscription-based with a free tier.

## Product

- [Home](https://pixzastudio.com/): Landing page with features, pricing, and demos
- [Create](https://pixzastudio.com/create): Simple AI generation mode — text to image/video/audio/3D
- [Studio](https://pixzastudio.com/studio): Visual node canvas for building multi-step AI pipelines
- [Tools](https://pixzastudio.com/tools): Free AI tools — background remover, magic eraser, upscaler, object remover
- [Batch Editor](https://pixzastudio.com/batch): Apply AI operations to multiple images at once
- [Examples](https://pixzastudio.com/examples): Community-generated examples with prompts
- [Gallery](https://pixzastudio.com/gallery): Personal generation history

## AI Tools (Free)

- [Background Remover](https://pixzastudio.com/tools/background-remover): Remove image backgrounds instantly
- [Magic Eraser](https://pixzastudio.com/tools/magic-eraser): Paint over objects to erase them with AI fill
- [AI Background Generator](https://pixzastudio.com/tools/ai-background): Replace backgrounds with AI-generated scenes
- [Object Remover](https://pixzastudio.com/tools/object-remover): Remove unwanted objects from photos
- [Image Upscaler](https://pixzastudio.com/tools/image-upscaler): Enhance and sharpen images with AI

## Pricing

- Free: ₹0/month — 100 credits, Cloudflare free models, Gemini Flash Image
- Pro: ₹999/month — 3,000 credits, FLUX Dev, Imagen 4, Seedance video, no watermarks
- Agency: ₹2,999/month — 8,000 credits, Veo 3 Fast, everything in Pro, priority support

## AI Models Available

### Image Generation
- FLUX.1 Schnell (free, Cloudflare)
- FLUX.2 Klein 4B/9B (free, Cloudflare)
- FLUX.2 Dev (free, Cloudflare, image-to-image)
- SDXL, SDXL Lightning, DreamShaper (free, Cloudflare)
- Gemini Flash Image (free quota)
- FLUX Dev Ultra Fast (Pro, WaveSpeed)
- Imagen 3 / Imagen 4 (Pro, Google)

### Video Generation
- Wan 2.1 Fast (Pro, WaveSpeed)
- Seedance 1.5 Lite/Pro (Pro, WaveSpeed)
- Seedance 2.0 (Agency, WaveSpeed)
- Veo 3 Fast (Agency, KIE.ai — $0.40/8s)
- Veo 2 (Agency, Google)
- Veo 3 (Agency, Google)

## Content

- [Blog](https://pixzastudio.com/blog): AI tutorials, model comparisons, workflow guides
- [Waitlist](https://pixzastudio.com/waitlist): Join early access

## Company

- [Contact](https://pixzastudio.com/contact): Get in touch
- [Privacy Policy](https://pixzastudio.com/privacy)
- [Terms of Service](https://pixzastudio.com/terms)

## Technical

- Built with: Next.js 16, TypeScript, Tailwind CSS, Prisma, WordPress (auth + CMS)
- Payments: Razorpay (INR)
- AI Providers: Cloudflare Workers AI, Google Gemini/Vertex AI, WaveSpeed, KIE.ai
- Deployment: Vercel

## Optional

- [Sitemap](https://pixzastudio.com/sitemap.xml)
- [RSS/Blog Feed](https://pixzastudio.com/blog)
